questions.question: Describe the typical architecture of a data warehouse and explain how it differs from a Hadoop environment. (15 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the key components of both systems and their respective advantages

questions.question: What is the primary difference between a relational database management system (RDBMS) and a NoSQL database like HBase in a Hadoop environment? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on data schema, data model, and data retrieval mechanisms

questions.question: A data warehouse is typically designed to support what type of data processing and analytics? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the data processing and analytics tasks that a data warehouse is well-suited for
